name: Liberty Gold Corp.
description: Liberty Gold Corp. is a mineral exploration and development company focused on the acquisition and advancement of high-quality gold projects in the Great Basin of the United States. Headquartered in Vancouver, British Columbia, the company is primarily engaged in the exploration and development of its flagship Black Pine and Goldstrike projects. Liberty Gold leverages a team of experienced geologists and mining professionals to identify and unlock value in historically productive mining districts, aiming to deliver significant growth for its shareholders through disciplined exploration and strategic development of its precious metal assets.
